---
title: "Overview"
description: |
  All blog posts, sorted by publication date (newest first).
site: distill::distill_website
listing: posts
---

<div class="cv-home-deco" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="cv-geo-sidebar"></div>
  <div class="cv-geo-accent cv-geo-accent--circle"></div>
  <div class="cv-geo-accent cv-geo-accent--bar"></div>
  <div class="cv-geo-accent cv-geo-accent--rect"></div>
</div>

All blog posts are listed below, with the most recent at the top.

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  function injectListingBadge() {
    var h2 = document.querySelector('a.post-preview[href*="2026-06-05-test"] .description h2');
    if (!h2 || h2.querySelector(".title-badge-slot")) return;
    var slot = document.createElement("span");
    slot.className = "title-badge-slot";
    slot.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
    var img = document.createElement("img");
    img.src = "posts/2026-06-05-test/title-badge.png";
    img.alt = "";
    slot.appendChild(img);
    h2.appendChild(slot);
  }
  function schedule() {
    injectListingBadge();
    setTimeout(injectListingBadge, 100);
    setTimeout(injectListingBadge, 500);
  }
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", schedule);
  window.addEventListener("WebComponentsReady", schedule);
  window.addEventListener("load", schedule);
})();
</script>
```
